description.ko: 유리와 빛의 상호작용을 통해 탄생하는 화려한 스펙트럼을 탐구합니다. 투명함과 굴절된 색채의 역동적인 조화가 돋보이는 장면으로, 정교한 시각적 깊이를 전달합니다.
description.en: A captivating visual exploration of light as it interacts with glass, breaking into a brilliant spectrum. The scene highlights the delicate balance between transparency and the vibrant complexity of refracted colors.

prompt: A high-end cinematic shot of a complex glass prism, sunlight piercing through, intense light refraction, spectral dispersion creating vivid rainbow flares, caustic light patterns on a minimalist background, hyper-realistic glass textures, macro photography, 8k resolution, volumetric lighting, ethereal atmosphere, PRISM-2 style.
